summary: Completed comprehensive testing of paper reading web app with AI-powered contextual word lookup. All previous issues have been successfully resolved. Backend APIs fully functional (11/11 tests passed). Frontend working perfectly with all critical fixes verified.
passed_tests:

elements
Word clicking functionality with explanation panel
AI explanation generation with loading indicator
Caching verification with 'Instant' badge on repeat clicks

Complete end-to-end workflow from paper creation to bookmarking
